/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libns3.43-tap-bridge-debug.so -o /home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib/libns3.43-tap-bridge-debug.so "CMakeFiles/tap-bridge.dir/helper/tap-bridge-helper.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/tap-bridge.dir/model/tap-bridge.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/tap-bridge.dir/model/tap-encode-decode.cc.o"   -L/home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib:::::::::::::::::::::::::::: -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib/libns3.43-internet-debug.so -Wl,--as-needed /home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib/libns3.43-bridge-debug.so /home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib/libns3.43-traffic-control-debug.so /home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib/libns3.43-network-debug.so /home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib/libns3.43-stats-debug.so /home/ayush-gaurav/ns-allinone-3.43/ns-3.43/build/lib/libns3.43-core-debug.so -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgsl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgslcblas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so
